histrix.title: Scan

field.expression: concat( codigo_locacion, ' stock: ', ifnull( (select stock_actual from STK_ARTICULO_LOCACION WHERE stkarticulo_id = '[__stkarticulo_id__]' and id_stklocacion = stklocacion_id limit 1), '0') )
(select 0 from STK_ARTICULO_LOCACION WHERE stkarticulo_id = '[__stkarticulo_id__]' and id_stklocacion = stklocacion_id limit 1)
